content.mi:
Te Whakapapa o Te Tahi

Te Tahi-o-Te-Rā ehara i te mea he tangata noa.

He mokopuna ia nō Toroa, te rangatira nui o te waka o Mātaatua, ā, he tama nā Ruaihona.

I tipu ake ia hei tohunga kaha rawa atu —

He kaiwhakaora...He kaitiaki...Ā, i ētahi wā… he mea whakamataku.
content.en:
Te Tahi’s Lineage

Te Tahi-o-Te-Rā was no ordinary being.

He was a mokopuna of Toroa, the great rangatira of the Mātaatua waka, and the son of Ruaihona.

He grew to become a tohunga of immense power—

A healer...A protector...And sometimes… someone to fear.
